name: katana-mcp
description: MCP server for Katana Network DeFi operations — wallet, Sushi DEX, Morpho lending, analytics

scripts.eval: npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/wallet.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/sushi.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/morpho.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/analytics.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/merkl.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/perps.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/kat.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/kat-tools.yaml
scripts.eval:kat: npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/kat.yaml && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/suites/kat-tools.yaml
